data.label: Date only
data.description: Birth date without time, timezone, or calculatory location.

data.label: Date with location without timezone
data.description: Date and calculatory location without time or timezone; location does not narrow uncertainty window in V1.

data.label: Date with timezone without time
data.description: Date and IANA timezone without time; local civil day window.

data.label: Date with location and timezone without time
data.description: Date, timezone, and calculatory location without time; local day window; location audited but not used for houses without time.

data.label: Datetime without location
data.description: Declared birth datetime with timezone; no calculatory location.

data.label: Complete birth data
data.description: Date, time, timezone, and calculatory location.
